(NYSE:NUE ) Q1 2022 Earnings Conference Call April 21, 2022 2:00 PM ET Company Participants Leon Topalian - President, CEO & Director Stephen Laxton - CFO, Treasurer & EVP Rex Query - EVP, Sheet & Tubular Products Allen Behr - EVP, Plate & Structural Products Chad Utermark - EVP, Fabricated Construction Products Douglas Jellison - EVP, Raw Materials Conference Call Participants Emily Chieng - Goldman Sachs Group Carlos De Alba - Morgan Stanley Timna Tanners - Wolfe Research Seth Rosenfeld - BNP Paribas Exane Curtis Woodworth - Crédit Suisse Operator Good day, everyone, and welcome to the Nucor Corporation First Quarter of 2022 Earnings Call. As a reminder, today's call is being recorded.

title: Nucor Clocks 50% Sales Growth In Q1, Tops Street View
text: Nucor Corp (NYSE: NUE) reported first-quarter FY22 net sales growth of 49.5% year-over-year to $10.49 billion, beating the consensus of $10.48 billion. EPS improved to $7.67 from $3.10 in 1Q21, beating the consensus of $7.29.

title: So What's Happening With Nucor Shares Rising Thursday?
text: Nucor Corporation (NYSE: NUE) shares are trading higher by 4.41% at $176.72 after the company reported better-than-expected first-quarter EPS and sales results. Nucor reported quarterly earnings of $7.67 per share which beat the analyst consensus estimate of $7.29.

title: Nucor: Q1 Earnings, Top-Line Up 50%, EPS Up 147%, ROE Of 14%, At 7x EPS
text: Nucor manufactures and sells steel products. With steel prices soaring and supply restricted, Nucor is a well-positioned beneficiary. Nucor's pristine balance sheet, the strongest in the steel sector, allows it to return excess free cash flow to shareholders.
